title: Hiring Category Manager at Reliance Digital

jsonLd.title: Hiring Category Manager at Reliance Digital
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Reliance Digital. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Category Manager to strengthen our Gurgaon-based team.

About Reliance Digital:
Reliance Digital is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in A/B Testing

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Flexible working hours
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Gurgaon, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Reliance Digital!
